flow-definition.description: Build Carbonet on 233, deploy to 221, and optionally scale out to idle Nomad nodes.

hudson.model.PasswordParameterDefinition.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
hudson.model.PasswordParameterDefinition.description: Optional GitHub token for authenticated fetch. Leave blank for public clone.

hudson.model.PasswordParameterDefinition.name: IDLE_SSH_PASSWORD
hudson.model.PasswordParameterDefinition.description: SSH password for idle runtime nodes

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: ENABLE_IDLE_SCALE
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: Scale out an idle runtime when main runtime pressure is warning or critical

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: ENABLE_IDLE_DRAIN
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: Drain and restore one idle runtime using saved Nomad state

hudson.model.ChoiceParameterDefinition.name: DRAIN_IDLE_TARGET_IP
hudson.model.ChoiceParameterDefinition.description: Idle target IP to drain when ENABLE_IDLE_DRAIN is true
